introSection: Tom & Jerry (also known as Tom & Jerry Picnic en el Parque) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Parque Warner Madrid in San Martín de la Vega, Community of Madrid, Spain. It is themed to the cartoon Tom and Jerry.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride was intended to open at Six Flags Fiesta Texas in San Antonio, Texas, USA in 2000 and was to be named Boardwalk Canyon Blaster. The ride was listed on park maps and it was delivered to the park and kept in the employee parking lot, but was never assembled. It was later relocated to Parque Warner Madrid.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Tom & Jerry's layout consists of two figure eights surrounded by an oval.

fullText:
Tom & Jerry (also known as Tom & Jerry Picnic en el Parque) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Parque Warner Madrid in San Martín de la Vega, Community of Madrid, Spain. It is themed to the cartoon Tom and Jerry.

The ride was intended to open at Six Flags Fiesta Texas in San Antonio, Texas, USA in 2000 and was to be named Boardwalk Canyon Blaster. The ride was listed on park maps and it was delivered to the park and kept in the employee parking lot, but was never assembled. It was later relocated to Parque Warner Madrid.

Tom & Jerry's layout consists of two figure eights surrounded by an oval.
